commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows `openclaw secrets apply` `.env` scrubbing to migrated provider/plugin credential env keys and adds regression coverage for same-value credential collisions.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +301. Total +327 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: current main scrubs by migrated value across all known secret env keys, and the PR body shows real CLI before/after output for same-value `.env` collisions. I did not run a local repro because this review was read-only.
